title: AUB Extension Component Registry
description: Project-level registry of namespaced (team:component) custom component types resolved by AUB validation and bundled into agent handoffs.

name.description: Namespaced type, team:component (e.g. acme:data_card). Must not collide with a core type.

isContainer.description: true if the component may declare children; false for a leaf.

description.description: What the component is — agents read this to resolve the type without guessing.
